meaning: n.阵雨,淋浴,(一)阵,(一)大批vt.大量地给与
examples: She usually sings in the shower.
She heard him turn on the shower.
We now have a functioning shower.
To avoid contaminating the little critters, scientists have to shower and scrub before entering mouse quarters.
"You may not have a shower, but you may gain the most amazing rooftop views, " she writes.
